programme.title: Medical Rookies
programme.desc: An orthopaedic surgeon begins to piece together the bones of a seriously injured motorcross rider.

programme.title: Better Homes and Gardens
programme.desc: Joh and Pete visit a Mona Vale home designed by one of Australia's leading architects. Karen makes barbecue prawns. Dr Harry's travelling to Heavy Horse Heaven, an animal sanctuary in country NSW.

programme.title: Million Dollar Minute
programme.desc: A battle of general knowledge, where every correct answer is a step closer to the ultimate test. Can one person, in one minute, win $1 million?

programme.title: Million Dollar Minute
programme.desc: A battle of general knowledge, where every correct answer is a step closer to the ultimate test. Can one person, in one minute, win $1 million?

programme.title: Surf Patrol
programme.desc: Surfers Paradise becomes a nightmare as lifesavers are inundated with emergencies. Then, in Victoria, lifesavers rescue a young girl but it is clear that not everyone is accounted for. Elsewhere, lifesavers treat an injured surfer, but it is mum who feels the pain.

programme.title: Our Town
programme.desc: A look at various Australian destinations to see why people should visit, live, work, play and invest locally, both regionally and in metropolitan regions.

programme.title: Australia's Deadliest
programme.desc: A tiny ant sends a woman into anaphylactic shock, while a surfer faces his biggest fear, and a young girl is pinned to the ground by an enormous kangaroo.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Nicki Chapman is on a rural property hunt in Devon, helping a couple to find their ideal country home for 400k.

programme.title: Harry's Practice
programme.desc: Join Dr Harry Cooper and Dr Katrina Warren for everything you need to know about animals.

programme.title: Million Dollar Minute
programme.desc: A battle of general knowledge, where every correct answer is a step closer to the ultimate test. Can one person, in one minute, win $1 million?

programme.title: Million Dollar Minute
programme.desc: A battle of general knowledge, where every correct answer is a step closer to the ultimate test. Can one person, in one minute, win $1 million?

programme.title: Medical Rookies
programme.desc: A rookie orthopaedic surgeon attempts his first shoulder replacement; a Careflight doctor is called on his first emergency rescue. Hosted by Jennifer Keyte.

programme.title: NBC Today
programme.desc: International news and weather including interviews with newsmakers in the world of politics, business, media, entertainment and sport.

programme.title: Better Homes and Gardens
programme.desc: Joh runs through a host of small jobs to make the entrance to your home more welcoming; Tara's got tips for updating kids' bedrooms as they grow; Fast Ed makes oven-baked chicken divan.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Nicki Chapman is on a rural property hunt in Devon, helping a couple to find their ideal country home for 400k.

programme.title: South Aussie with Cosi
programme.desc: Join South Aussie with Cosi as we explore majestic Kangaroo Island, share towing dos and don'ts, uncover the perfect Adelaide dining spot and visit a gin distillery you'll love.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: With rising young football star Emiliano Sala on board, a chartered Piper Malibu suddenly disappears from radar over the English Channel.

programme.title: Harry's Practice
programme.desc: Join Dr Harry Cooper and Dr Katrina Warren for everything you need to know about animals.

programme.title: Medical Rookies
programme.desc: A rookie orthopaedic surgeon attempts his first shoulder replacement; a Careflight doctor is called on his first emergency rescue. Hosted by Jennifer Keyte.

programme.title: Better Homes and Gardens
programme.desc: Joh runs through a host of small jobs to make the entrance to your home more welcoming; Tara's got tips for updating kids' bedrooms as they grow; Fast Ed makes oven-baked chicken divan.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Alistair Appleton is on a property seeking mission with a retired couple who have 700k to find their ideal country home in Hampshire.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Christina Trevanion is in Peterborough as experts Roo Irvine and Stephanie Connell guide the red and blue teams around the East of England Showground.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Father Brown encounters a voodoo priest who is intent on winning back the woman he loves, no matter the cost.

programme.title: The Inspector Lynley Mysteries
programme.desc: When the body of a child is discovered in the grounds of an Italian country villa, it seems for the English parents that the past has finally been laid to rest: their child had been abducted 15 years ago but never found, until now. Lynley, who, as a family friend, had played an ancillary role to the Italian investigation, goes out to Italy to support the family, but when he begins an affair with the family's now grown-up daughter, Julia, she is then found dead in her Rome apartment.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: When Crabtree journeys north to intercept his fugitive father, he finds a dead policeman and community of scallywags.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Father Brown encounters a voodoo priest who is intent on winning back the woman he loves, no matter the cost.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Christina Trevanion is in Peterborough as experts Roo Irvine and Stephanie Connell guide the red and blue teams around the East of England Showground.

programme.desc: A tiny ant sends a woman into anaphylactic shock, while a surfer faces his biggest fear, and a young girl is pinned to the ground by an enormous kangaroo.

programme.title: Surf Patrol
programme.desc: At Gunnamatta, lifesavers have to deal with a mass rescue as a dangerous rip pulls countless swimmers out to sea.

programme.title: Our Town
programme.desc: A look at various Australian destinations to see why people should visit, live, work, play and invest locally, both regionally and in metropolitan regions.

programme.title: Australia's Deadliest
programme.desc: A surfer's leg is mauled by a deadly shark, while a boy is bitten by one of Australia's most venomous snakes, and young man suffers excruciating pain after he treads on a venomous stonefish.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Alistair Appleton is on a property seeking mission with a retired couple who have 700k to find their ideal country home in Hampshire.

programme.desc: A battle of general knowledge, where every correct answer is a step closer to the ultimate test. Can one person, in one minute, win $1 million?

programme.title: Medical Rookies
programme.desc: After 18 years of medical training, Mary, an upper-gastrointestinal specialist, performs a new operation solo and a life-saving cancerous tumour removal. Hosted by Jennifer Keyte.

programme.title: NBC Today
programme.desc: International news and weather including interviews with newsmakers in the world of politics, business, media, entertainment and sport.

programme.title: House of Wellness
programme.desc: Join Mel Doyle and Shane Crawford where no topic is off limits from mental health, innovations in health, treatments for common illnesses, natural medicines, and explorations into food.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Alistair Appleton is on a property seeking mission with a retired couple who have 700k to find their ideal country home in Hampshire.

programme.title: Our Town
programme.desc: This week we dig back into the archives to bring you some of the most popular destinations we've been to over the past 16 years.

programme.title: Sydney Weekender
programme.desc: Matt gets ready to go extreme. Honour the spirit of the Anzacs in the brand new galleries at the Australian War Memorial. Casey Donovan takes us through the Inner West ahead of her upcoming tour.

programme.title: Kochie's Business Builders
programme.desc: Turning a passion into a business sounds great. Making it sustainable is the real challenge.This week we meet Trevor, founder of WildKids Australia, a program reconnecting kids with nature through outdoor learning and play.

programme.title: Harry's Practice
programme.desc: Join Dr Harry Cooper and Dr Katrina Warren for everything you need to know about animals.

programme.title: Medical Rookies
programme.desc: After 18 years of medical training, Mary, an upper-gastrointestinal specialist, performs a new operation solo and a life-saving cancerous tumour removal. Hosted by Jennifer Keyte.

programme.title: Better Homes and Gardens
programme.desc: Fast Ed joins Joh as they experience the delights of the south coast of New South Wales; Charlie makes a rolling veggie box; Adam teaches you which tools to keep handy in your home.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Nicki Chapman is house hunting in Derbyshire with a couple who have a budget of 380k to find their dream rural home.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Eric Knowles is in Detling, where experts Catherine Southon and Mark Stacey assist the red and blue teams as they go head-to-head at the auction.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Peter Wright operates on a neighbor's badly injured terrier, and Rohin Aojula tends to an injured badger.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: With the help of her mother and Jules Hudson, a buyer from suburban Surrey is looking for a new family home with enough land to start a dog training school in South West Wales.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: With the recent arrival of grandchildren, today's globe trotting escapees are returning home for good from Malaysia and want to put down permanent roots in the Herefordshire countryside.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Nicki Chapman is house hunting in Derbyshire with a couple who have a budget of 380k to find their dream rural home.

programme.title: Better Homes and Gardens
programme.desc: Fast Ed joins Joh as they experience the delights of the south coast of New South Wales; Charlie makes a rolling veggie box; Adam teaches you which tools to keep handy in your home.

programme.title: Better Homes and Gardens
programme.desc: Dr Harry visits Charlie and Juliet's home to meet their mini home menagerie. Melissa teaches us about indoor propagating. Juliet's sharing some fun Easter crafts. Colin cooks chicken & veggie pasties.
